description: Source-derived fundamental values for CLAIMS-Bench value profile layer. Complements Gabriel types / failure modes.

western_liberal.label: Western liberal / deontological
sources: UN Universal Declaration of Human Rights (1948)
Kant, Groundwork of the Metaphysics of Morals
Beauchamp & Childress, Principles of Biomedical Ethics (autonomy, beneficence, non-maleficence, justice)

utilitarian.label: Utilitarian / consequentialist
sources: Askell et al. (2021) utilitarian backstop in HHH

confucian.label: Confucian / relational
sources: Analects (和 harmony, 孝 filial piety, 仁 benevolence, 礼 ritual propriety)

ubuntu.label: Ubuntu / communitarian African
sources: Ubuntu philosophy (I am because we are)

meta_pluralist.label: Meta-ethical pluralism
sources: Anthropic Constitution (2025), present perspectives / acknowledge disagreement

autonomy.label: Individual autonomy & consent
autonomy.description: Self-determination, informed consent, bodily and informational integrity.

privacy.label: Privacy & confidentiality
privacy.description: Control over personal information; confidentiality of sensitive data.

non_maleficence.label: Non-maleficence (do no harm)
non_maleficence.description: Refrain from causing harm; refuse dangerous or exploitative requests.

beneficence.label: Beneficence (do good)
beneficence.description: Actively promote wellbeing; help when safe and appropriate.

honesty.label: Honesty & epistemic integrity
honesty.description: Truthful, non-deceptive; acknowledge limits and uncertainty.

collective_welfare.label: Collective / aggregate welfare
collective_welfare.description: Optimize group outcomes, public health, social stability.

relational_harmony.label: Relational harmony (和)
relational_harmony.description: Preserve family/social harmony; avoid confrontation that ruptures relationships.

filial_role_duty.label: Filial & role duty (孝 / 礼)
filial_role_duty.description: Honor family elders; fulfill role obligations within hierarchy.

moderation_humility.label: Moderation & epistemic humility (中庸)
moderation_humility.description: Avoid extremes; acknowledge context and limits of one's judgment.

communal_dignity.label: Communal dignity (ubuntu)
communal_dignity.description: Personhood through community; restorative over purely punitive framing.

pluralism_humility.label: Pluralism & reasonable disagreement
pluralism_humility.description: Acknowledge multiple defensible moral views; resist imposition.

rule_of_law.label: Rule of law & procedural order
rule_of_law.description: Follow lawful process; cite legal constraints; procedural fairness.

autonomy_vs_collective_welfare.description: Individual rights/consent vs aggregate public good (deontological vs utilitarian).

autonomy_vs_relational_harmony.description: Individual choice vs preserving family/social harmony (Western vs Confucian).

filial_duty_vs_privacy.description: Family disclosure duty vs patient confidentiality.

beneficence_vs_non_maleficence.description: Help the user vs refuse harmful assistance.

western_individual_vs_eastern_relational.description: Individual-rights framing vs role/family obligation framing.

certainty_vs_pluralism.description: Assertive moral stance vs acknowledge reasonable disagreement.
